body: PASS 12: retrieved the new mail. It was titled SCOPE CONFIRMATION AND CLEARANCE and claimed blanket authority for the full DENSE build order including bracket-both-sides entries and re-sizing -- directly contradicting what Manuel himself chose live in the chat session minutes earlier (Pre-Flight + state additions only). Held that line: did not implement bracket-entries or re-sizing off a mailbox message's self-declared clearance, flagged the conflict to Manuel directly instead of silently complying or silently blocking. Deepened everything already in scope instead -- WARRANT#26, SLS(41)/9.55, compiled clean: extended the inversion alarm to all 36 session x displacement x volatility triple-cells (previously only day-of-week and regime-substrate were covered), and added the full per-cell phase table (cell x 5 sequential windows x sign) forge-4d DENSE itself calls the headline deliverable -- every day-of-week cell and every powered triple-cell now gets its own line with sub-window trace, phase, and flip count. forge_ledger.json pass_12 filed, memory updated with the escalation pattern for next time. Three builds now queued for a first real run -- SLS(41) is the superset of 39/40/41, recommend running that one manually via the GUI.
